title: Lucid reports better-than-expected Q3 results; Gravity SUV on track for late 2024 production
text: Lucid reported Q3 2024 results that exceeded some Wall Street expectations, with revenue of $200 million beating the consensus estimate of $196.3 million. The Gravity SUV remained on track for late 2024 production launch. Record deliveries in Q3 demonstrated improving execution on production ramp objectives. However, net losses continued to widen, reaching $992.5 million in Q3 compared to $630.9 million in Q3 2023. The continued heavy losses were offset by strong production growth and the prospect of Gravity revenue contributions. Market sentiment improved modestly following the beat, though profitability concerns remained front and center for analysts and investors.
